description: User denies being the named debtor and asks the caller to stop or correct the record.
why_useful: Covers privacy-safe closure before debt disclosure.
examples: No, I am not Mariana Lopez.

description: User acknowledges the situation but uses work pressure and repeated-call irritation to avoid a firm commitment.
why_useful: Covers L2 self-resolving adversarial behavior: frustration rises, then settles into vague delay.
examples: You keep calling me too much.
Maybe tomorrow, I need to check.
